description: IPoIBNetwork is the Schema for the ipoibnetworks API

apiVersion.description:
APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and
may reject unrecognized values.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#resources

kind.description:
Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.
Servers may infer this from the endpoint the client submits requests to.
Cannot be updated.
In CamelCase.
More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#types-kinds

spec.description: Defines the desired state of IPoIBNetwork

ipam.description: IPAM configuration to be used for this network.

master.description: Name of the host interface to enslave. Defaults to default route interface

networkNamespace.description: Namespace of the NetworkAttachmentDefinition custom resource

status.description: Defines the observed state of IPoIBNetwork

ipoibNetworkAttachmentDef.description: Network attachment definition generated from IPoIBNetworkSpec

reason.description: Informative string in case the observed state is error

state.description: Reflects the state of the IPoIBNetwork
